details.address: 2373 Len Patterson Rd Ste 103, Fort Mill, SC 29708

raw_data.address: 2373 Len Patterson Rd Ste 103, Fort Mill, SC 29708
raw_data.name: Haraz Coffee House

reviews_data.review_text: Excellent service and delicious tea. Highly recommend the Saffron Adeni! It was so good! I recommend getting sugar with it as the sugar enhances the spices and doesn't make it that sweet. The space is beautiful and the desserts looked amazing. You can also buy bags of Adeni Chai tea and coffees. New favorite spot!

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text:
Yo, let me tell you somethin'... my daughter and I pulled up to the grand opening of Haraz Coffee House in Tega Cay, SC and WOWWWW! How ya doin?! 🤌☕ This place? Fuggedaboutit!
From the second we walked in, the spot looked GRAND — classy, beautiful, and gave straight-up "little piece of Dubai landed in South Carolina" vibes. The atmosphere was clean, elegant, and felt like an experience, not just a coffee stop.
Now let’s talk FOOD because whew! I got the Pistachio Cheesecake with their traditional Haraz Mawufar, and lemme tell ya... that combo was hittin'! Rich, flavorful, and absolutely delicious. My daughter got the Pistachio Cloud Matcha and was loving every sip.
And the staff? Super polite, welcoming, and made us feel right at home. Service was top-tier.
10 outta 10 across the board! If you're anywhere near Tega Cay, stop what you're doing and GO! We’ll definitely be back. How ya doin?! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Beautiful new store here in a great fort mill location. (Good parking!) I'm so glad we have this here! I can finally come to Haraz without driving to Ballantyne or deeper Charlotte ❤️ Coffee was delicious and the pastries are lovely.

Looking forward to see this place thrive.
